q: What were your favourite activities when you were a child?
examiner_note: Giám khảo muốn bạn kể về các hoạt động giải trí thời thơ ấu. Bạn nên sử dụng thì quá khứ (Past Simple) và các cấu trúc thói quen như 'used to' hoặc 'would'. Hãy mô tả chi tiết một hoặc hai hoạt động (ví dụ: chơi đồ hàng, thả diều, đá bóng) và cảm xúc của bạn khi đó (vui vẻ, phấn khích). Các cụm từ như 'carefree days', 'childhood antics', 'spark my imagination' rất hữu ích.

band7.text: When I was a child, I absolutely loved playing hide-and-seek with my friends in the neighborhood. We would spend hours running around and laughing. I also really enjoyed drawing and would often create my own little comic books with crayons.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, rõ ràng. Sử dụng đúng thì quá khứ và cấu trúc 'would' cho thói quen. Từ vựng tự nhiên.

band8.text: Oh, I have such fond memories of my childhood activities. I was particularly enamored with outdoor games like flying kites in the open fields near my house. There was something magical about watching the kite soar high in the sky. Besides that, I spent a lot of time building LEGO sets, which really helped spark my imagination and creativity.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng miêu tả tốt (fond memories, enamored with, soar high, spark my imagination). Cách diễn đạt trôi chảy và giàu cảm xúc.

band9.text: Looking back, my childhood was a tapestry of diverse and engaging activities. I was an exceptionally inquisitive child, and one of my absolute favorites was embarking on 'nature expeditions' in our garden, where I’d observe insects and collect interesting stones. Additionally, I would frequently orchestrate elaborate role-playing scenarios with my siblings, which served as a wonderful creative outlet. Those carefree days were truly instrumental in shaping my inquisitive nature.
band9.note: Vốn từ vựng cực kỳ phong phú và tinh tế (tapestry, inquisitive, embarking on, expeditions, orchestrate, elaborate, creative outlet, instrumental). Cách lập luận và mô tả mang tính phản tư cao.

v.example: I have fond memories of my summers at the seaside.
I was enamored with the world of dinosaurs as a young boy.
The eagle soared high above the mountains.
Storytelling is a great way to spark imagination in children.

v.meaning: một chuỗi các hoạt động đa dạng (như một tấm thảm dệt)
v.example: His life was a rich tapestry of experiences and travels.

v.meaning: đứa trẻ ham học hỏi/tò mò
v.example: As an inquisitive child, he was always asking 'why'.

v.meaning: bắt tay vào/bắt đầu (một hành trình/nhiệm vụ)
v.example: She is about to embark on a new diplomatic mission.

v.meaning: sắp xếp/điều phối (một cách tỉ mỉ)
v.example: The surprise party was perfectly orchestrated by his friends.
They made elaborate preparations for the wedding.

v.meaning: nơi giải tỏa sự sáng tạo
v.example: Writing poetry is her main creative outlet.

v.meaning: đóng vai trò quan trọng trong
v.example: Her help was instrumental in getting the deal signed.

v.meaning: những ngày tháng không lo âu
v.example: I miss the carefree days of my youth.
Hide-and-seek was our favorite game at school.
We went to the park to fly a kite on a windy day.
I haven't played hopscotch since I was ten.
Playing tag in the yard was great exercise.
Role-playing is used in training to simulate real-life situations.
The children liked to pretend they were pirates.
She drew a beautiful house with her brand new crayons.

v.meaning: khối xây dựng/đồ chơi xếp hình
v.example: Wooden building blocks are a classic childhood toy.
Everyone rushed outside the moment recess started.
He's my childhood friend; we've known each other for twenty years.
It's a very friendly neighborhood where everyone knows each other.
Children have an innate curiosity about the natural world.

v.meaning: trò chơi đồ hàng (giả vờ làm gia đình)
v.example: The girls were playing house in the shade of the tree.
She spent all afternoon decorating her new dollhouse.
He had a huge collection of superhero action figures.
We love playing board games on rainy weekends.
He spends too much time playing video games.
I loved my father’s storytelling when I was young.
It's important to nurture a child's talent early on.
Going to the dark attic felt like a huge adventure.
The children couldn't hide their excitement for the trip.
The book captures the innocence of childhood perfectly.
She had a very religious upbringing.
The children were very sad when playtime ended.
The local playground was full of children on Sunday.
I loved going high on the swing set.
They were building a castle in the sandbox.
The mischievous little boy hid his mother's keys.
It was an energy-filled afternoon at the park.
That summer camp was an unforgettable experience.

v.meaning: những trò đùa tinh quái thời thơ ấu
v.example: We laughed as we remembered our childhood antics.
In their world of make believe, they were kings and queens.
He was a solitary child who preferred books to people.

v.meaning: sự gắn kết (giữa người với người)
v.example: Family meals are a great time for bonding.
The two siblings are very close and share many hobbies.
I spent a lot of my time in class daydreaming.
What do you like to do in your freetime?
I will cherish this gift forever.
